features.name: always_block_wildcard_sensitivity_with_function_using_instance_output
features.description: Code should include an always block with wildcard sensitivity (@*) that calls a function where an argument is an output signal from an instantiated module

features.name: function_argument_from_module_instance_output
features.description: Code should include a function call where at least one argument is an output from an instantiated module, used within an always @(*) block
